name: cozytouch_heatpump
description: Read/control Atlantic Cozytouch heat pump and DHW (status, energy, setpoint, mode, hot water).
help_example:
cozy — current status
cozy devices — list devices
cozy raw — raw states (diagnostics)
cozy energy — energy consumption
cozy set 21 — set target °C (zone derogation)
cozy mode stop|heating|cooling — main heat pump mode
cozy preset comfort|eco|away|frost|auto|manu — zone preset
cozy hotwater on|off|boost

Recipes:
• Warm up now: cozy mode heating → cozy set 22
• Back to schedule: cozy preset auto
• Leaving for a while: cozy preset away
• Summer / long absence: cozy mode stop and cozy hotwater off
• Hot shower soon: cozy hotwater boost
• Check power use: cozy energy
